div.p: Click the button below to add one

div.t-if: (state.tabAktif === 'mold' and (rec.lead_time or rec.ready_date)) or (state.tabAktif !== 'mold' and rec.finish_date)

t.t-esc: state.form.mode === 'edit' ? '✏️ Edit Work Order' : '➕ Add Work Order'

textarea.placeholder: Multiple lines allowed — press Enter for a new line...

div.label: Reference Image
div.span: Reference for the designer. The designer's own image is uploaded later when submitting for approval.

div.label: Executor

input.placeholder: -- Select user or type a name --

div.span: Pick a system user, or type a custom executor name below.

div.code: Type, Name, Code, Brand, Job Type, Production, Qty, Details, Executor, Section, Local/RRC, Requestor, Req Date, Lead Time (Hour), Target Finish (Date), Approver, Approval Date, Status

ul.li: Name is required. No. is generated automatically (not needed in CSV).
Type: Design / Mold / Maintenance / Utility (default Design). Production & Section: created automatically if not exist.
Executor filled with a user name; matched against users with Work Orders access. If no user matches, it is saved as a custom name (you can later use Merge Executor to link it to a registered user).
Requestor/Approver filled with a name (e.g. P. Setiadi); created automatically as a new option if it does not exist yet.
Job Type filled with a name (e.g. Box, Layer); created automatically as a new option if it does not exist yet.
Local/RRC: Local / RRC. Status: Ongoing / Finished. Date: YYYY-MM-DD or DD/MM/YYYY.
Image is not imported — add/edit it manually in the form after import.
Import adds data — existing data is not deleted.

t.p: Merge a custom Executor name (e.g. from import, like "Bu Tina") into a registered user (e.g. "Tina"). All Work Orders with that custom name are reassigned to the chosen user.

t.div: No custom Executor names found. Nothing to merge.

t.p: Merge a Requestor into another (e.g. "Bu Tina" → "Tina"). All Work Orders using the source are reassigned to the target, then the source entry is removed.

t.div: No Requestor used yet. Nothing to merge.

div.p: This list is shared for both Requestor and Approver.
Rejecting Work Order . The status will return to draft. Please describe in detail what needs to be revised:
div.label: Attach Image (optional)
Revision Detail *
Designer Image (optional)

t.div: Drag & drop an image here, or
t.label: Choose file

div.label: Description *

textarea.placeholder: Describe the design / what was done...

div.p: Isi sendiri tanggal Target Finish dan perkiraan Lead Time (jam) untuk Work Order ini.
Approve this Work Order. You may add an optional Approve Detail (note) — it will be saved to the approval history.
Add the executor's image manually (e.g. for imported data without an image). This becomes the latest image shown on the Work Order — separate from the Reference Image.

t.div: Drag & drop an image here, or
t.label: Choose file
